title: Update Unity app to support controller tracking
description: Modify the TactAR Unity app to stream controller pose data (position + rotation + button states) via the meta-teleop multicast protocol, in addition to or instead of hand tracking. This is outside the scope of this repo and should be done separately in the TactAR Unity repository.

title: Update meta_quest_teleoperator to use controller tracking
description: Refactor MetaQuestTeleoperator to use controller tracking exclusively. Remove hand_pose and palm joint tracking paths. Tracking should only be active while a controller button is held (engagement via button press). Investigate whether meta-teleop-client already supports controller data channels.

title: Verify Quest controller tracking on hardware
description: End-to-end verification of Quest controller tracking with Franka robot. Test controller pose tracking, button-based engagement, and gripper control via lerobot-record with --teleop.type=meta_quest.

title: Verify end-to-end pipeline (teleoperation, training, inference)
description: End-to-end verification that the full lerobot pipeline works: dataset collection via teleoperation, RDP training on collected data, and inference on the real robot. This epic covers testing each component on real hardware.

title: Test teleoperation and recording on real robot
description: Verify the recording pipeline end-to-end on the inference PC with real hardware. Tests: (1) SpaceMouse teleoperation via lerobot-record with --teleop.type=spacemouse, (2) Haply teleoperation via lerobot-record with --teleop.type=haply, (3) Meta Quest teleoperation via lerobot-record with --teleop.type=meta_quest, (4) Camera recording with external and wrist RealSense cameras, (5) Preset loading from YAML presets, (6) Dataset integrity verification, (7) Multi-episode recording with robot go_home reset. File follow-up bugs for any issues found.

title: Rework relative action representation in policy
description: Rework how relative actions are computed and represented across the training and inference pipeline. Currently relative actions are computed w.r.t. the last TCP position in the trajectory. This epic covers understanding the existing action handling, aligning the code with existing conventions, and reworking relative actions to compute from the first TCP position with a per-step relative action option.
close_reason: Obsolete — relative action rework is no longer needed

title: Test inference on real robot
description: Run a trained policy on the real robot and verify: (1) Policy loads from checkpoint, (2) Observations received correctly from cameras/sensors via crisp_fastapi robot, (3) Policy inference runs at expected frequency, (4) Actions correctly sent to Franka robot, (5) Robot executes reasonable rollout. Can use lerobot-record with --policy.path or the async inference system.

title: Collect dataset using VR headset teleoperation
description: Record a manipulation dataset using Meta Quest VR headset teleoperation via lerobot-record with --robot.type=crisp_fastapi and --teleop.type=meta_quest. Save in lerobot format and upload to HuggingFace. Requires robot, Quest 3 headset, and cameras connected on the inference PC.

title: Collect dataset using SpaceMouse teleoperation
description: Record a manipulation dataset using SpaceMouse teleoperation via lerobot-record with --robot.type=crisp_fastapi and --teleop.type=spacemouse. Save in lerobot format and upload to HuggingFace. Requires robot, SpaceMouse, and cameras connected on the inference PC.
close_reason: SpaceMouse teleoperation is not precise or convenient enough for dataset collection

title: Collect dataset using Haply teleoperation
description: Record a manipulation dataset using Haply Inverse3 + VerseGrip teleoperation via lerobot-record with --robot.type=crisp_fastapi and --teleop.type=haply. Save in lerobot format and upload to HuggingFace. Requires robot, Haply device, and cameras connected on the inference PC.

title: Train RDP on collected dataset
description: Train the ported RDP models (AT + LDP two-stage) through LeRobot training infrastructure using a dataset collected via the teleoperation pipeline. Verify training runs to completion, losses converge, and checkpoints are saved correctly. Use lerobot-train with --policy.type=rdp_tokenizer for Stage 1 and --policy.type=rdp_latent_diffusion for Stage 2.
